title: ipis-thesis-pyrolysis-epr: Chance-constrained design of decentralized plastic-pyrolysis networks under feedstock-composition uncertainty
description: Reproducibility archive: validated pyrolysis yield and flowsheet models, feedstock-composition uncertainty set, GP surrogate training, two-stage stochastic and chance-constrained superstructure optimization, SAA replication study, TEA with Sobol analysis, and single-script regeneration of all manuscript figures. Companion to the manuscript submitted to Computers & Chemical Engineering.
